name: Four Holy Beasts
description: The Four Beasts are four ultimate Digimon that reign over the north, south, east and west of the Digital World. Qinglongmon (Lightning), Xuanwumon (Water), Zhuqiaomon (Fire) and Baihumon (Steel), the Four Holy Beasts have unlike other normal Digimon, twelve cores and four eyes respectively.
effects: Activation Effect:: Critical Damage Buffed by 30%

name: Fusion to evolve into the higher
description: Two or more Jogress Digimon can be combined to evolve into an entirely different digimon. A digimon successfully jogressed has great power and an essential role in the Digital World.
effects: Activation Effect:: Reset skills's cooldown time
Activation Condition:: 7% chance per Normal Hit

name: Three Archangels
description: They are the Three Great Archangels who are the leaders of all the angelic Digimon in the Digital World. They are Seraphimon who executes god's law, Cherubimon who protects wisdom and god's area, Ophanimon who delivers god's love. Also, they lead angelic army consists of man-type, animal-type, and woman-type angelic Digimon. Seraphimon is the highest of the three, and thus of all angelic Digimon.
effects: Activation Condition:: 3% chance per Normal Hit
Lasting time:: Lasts for 5 seconds after activation

name: Seafood Stew
description: The digimon looks like the food one can easily see in daily life.Mushroom, calm, fish, squid and pumpkin can make really great seafood stew if mixed harmoniously.Jogress FoodEvolve into the best seafood stew!

name: Sharp Blue Sword Wave
description: This in the group of the Digimon using big and nice blades to lead the battle.They are usually masters of swords so that it's very beautiful to watch they play with their swords.As the Digimon walk only on the sword's way, they commonly hold fast to their justice just like sharp blades.
effects: Activation Condition:: 6% chance per Normal Hit
Lasting time:: Lasts for 10 seconds after activation

name: Instant Red Gun Fire
description: This is the group of the Digimon using firearms like guns and cannons to win battles.Some of them unleash stylish attacks with pistols, the others deal heavy damage with cannon installed on their body. Gun using Digimon are usually cheerful, whereasCannon using Digimon are taciturn.
effects: Activation Effect:: Skill Damage is buffed by 8%
Activation Condition:: 7% chance per Normal Hit
Lasting time:: Lasts for 12 seconds after activation

name: So cute
description: This is the group of the Digimon that you want to be with. When you come back home, if one of the Digimon from the deck welcomes you, it will be your happy day.When you are uncomfortable, you can be calmed if you touch their shaggy hair.
effects: Activation Effect:: Critical Damage is Buffed by 15%

name: Four Dark Masters
description: Appearing at the latter part of the digimon adventure, they are powerful dark forces who can compress all the areas into one place. Four Dark Masters have Ultimate Digimon as servants.
effects: Activation Effect:: Skill Damage is buffed by 12%
Activation Condition:: 5% chance per Normal Hit
Lasting time:: Lasts for 10 seconds after activation

name: Ego of the Darkness
description: It is the final boss of Digimon Adventure and came from beyond the Wall of Fire to have the final fight with the Digidestined. It wanted to help the world but it is a collective agent of resentment of the Digimons that died out and are left behind by evolution. The egos of resentment disappeared in the darkness and decided to attack the Digital World to give the Digidestined and the other Digimons in the world of light "the same pain it suffered."
effects: Activation Effect:: HP is Buffed by 15%
Activation Condition:: 70% chance per Normal Hit
Lasting time:: Lasts for 5 seconds after activation

name: Royal Knights
description: 13 Holy Knight Digimon were gathered by Yggdrasil in order to manage the world, and boast absolute power within the Digital World.

name: Main characters of the adventure
description: Digimon Adventure's 8 main characters' partner Digimon. Tai's  partner Agumon, Matt's partner Gabumon, Izzy's partner Tentomon, Joe's partner Gomamon, T.K.'s partner Patamon, Mimi's partner Palmon, Sora's partner Biyomon and Kari's partner Gatomon are the members.

description: This is the group of the Digimon with wings who have become Burst Mode Digimon overcoming the power of Mega Digimon.Their wings influence all their actions from battle to moving.The wings can be the shield of the Digital World full of good will, but sometimes they can be the blade raising the wind of darkness.
